TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: . Irou ka mou-mha ta Mei-rang, ka ni-'illing-han ki Fariseen, ka masa'un mabatoung ta ni-pa-Pahtatæutæu u-han ta ni-'uloug-han-appati Jesus ti Joannes-an.
. Irou ka mou-mha ta Mei-rang, ka ni-'illing-han ki Fariseen, ka masa'un mabatoung ta ni-pa-Pahtatæutæu u-han ta ni-'uloug-han-appati Jesus ti Joannes-an.
S.TRANS: . Ald dan de Nere ber stondt dat de Pharseen ghehoort hadden dat Jesus meer Discipulen maeckte ende doopte dan Joannes:
When therefore the LORD knew how the Pharisees had heard that Jesus made and baptized more disciples than John,
主知道法利賽人聽見他收門徒，施洗，比約翰還多，（

S.FORM: (Meita ka assi ni-taeu-ma-do-en ti Jesus, râ ki Pahtatæutæu u-han tyn.)
(Meita ka assi ni-taeu-ma-do-en ti Jesus, râ ki Pahtatæutæu u-han tyn.)
S.TRANS: (Doewel Jesus selbe niet en doopte maer sijne Discipulen )
(Though Jesus himself baptized not, but his disciples,)
其實不是耶穌親自施洗，乃是他的門徒施洗，）

S.FORM: Anna-ta ni-darang-en tyn tou Juda, ka ni-sali kough mou-qua tou Galilæa.
Anna-ta ni-darang-en tyn tou Juda, ka ni-sali kough mou-qua tou Galilæa.
S.TRANS: Soo berliet hy Judeam ende gingh wederom henen na Galileen.
He left Judaea, and departed again into Galilee.
他就離了猶太，又往加利利去。

S.FORM: Ka kidi ka tau-qu'-eih tyn mali-deu'ua tou Samarien.
Ka kidi ka tau-qu'-eih tyn mali-deu'ua tou Samarien.
S.TRANS: Ende hy moest door Samarien gaen.
And he must needs go through Samaria.
必須經過撒馬利亞，

S.FORM: Anna-ta ni-iroua tou euma ki Samarien ka Sihgar ta ni-pana-nang-an tyn, tou ta mang ki mah-koul to'k ka na pæp'ǣ ti Jakob ki alak tyn ka paræh ka ti Josef.
Anna-ta ni-iroua tou euma ki Samarien ka Sihgar ta ni-pana-nang-an tyn, tou ta mang ki mah-koul to'k ka na pæp'ǣ ti Jakob ki alak tyn ka paræh ka ti Josef.
S.TRANS: Ny quam dan in een stadt ban Samarien ghenaemt Sichar na hy het stuck landts â€™t welck Jacob sijnen sone Joseph gaf.
Then cometh he to a city of Samaria, which is called Sychar, near to the parcel of ground that Jacob gave to his son Joseph.
於是到了撒馬利亞的一座城，名叫敘加，靠近雅各給他兒子約瑟的那塊地。

S.FORM: Ka akoumea hynna ta na tassyk ti Jacob. Irou-ra ka siba ta ti Jesus ki ni-oudadarang-en tyn, annata itoutouk-ato myrroung ki tassyk. Ka tou hivat-ato ki ka annum ki tǣ'lei da.
Ka akoumea hynna ta na tassyk ti Jacob. Irou-ra ka siba ta ti Jesus ki ni-oudadarang-en tyn, annata itoutouk-ato myrroung ki tassyk. Ka tou hivat-ato ki ka annum ki tǣ'lei da.
S.TRANS: Ende aldaer was de sonteyne Jacobs. Jesus dan bermoeyt zijnde ban de rense sat alsoo neder neben de sonteyne Net was ontrent de seste uure.
Now Jacob's well was there. Jesus therefore, being wearied with his journey, sat thus on the well: and it was about the sixth hour.
在那裏有雅各井；耶穌因走路困乏，就坐在井旁。那時約有午正。

S.FORM: Ka ni-iroua ta Ina ka makka Samarien mou-rau-raloum. Ni-k'ma tati Jesus tyni-æn,pa-ytt-â jau-an-nda.
Ka ni-iroua ta Ina ka makka Samarien mou-rau-raloum. Ni-k'ma tati Jesus tyni-æn,pa-ytt-â jau-an-nda.
S.TRANS: Daer quam een brouwe uyt Samarien om water ts putputten. Jesus seyde tot haer Geeft my te dincken.
There cometh a woman of Samaria to draw water: Jesus saith unto her, Give me to drink.
有一個撒馬利亞的婦人來打水。耶穌對她說：「請你給我水喝。」（

S.FORM: (Ka ni-d'marang ta Pahta tæutæu-'han tyn mu-euma, ka peil-auh nein ki kakang-in-da.)
(Ka ni-d'marang ta Pahta tæutæu-'han tyn mu-euma, ka peil-auh nein ki kakang-in-da.)
S.TRANS: ( Want sijne Discipulen waren henen qhegaen in de stadt op dat sy souden spijse koopen. )
(For his disciples were gone away unto the city to buy meat.)
那時門徒進城買食物去了。）

S.FORM: Anna-tani-k'ma tyni-æn ta. Ina ka makka Samarien, Tou-mimia-en-hou ka Jode-kow ma-ma ki mang, ki pa-yt-au-mau-kow, ka ynna-koh ka makka Sa-maria? Dou äoussi ki saou-saäl-en ki poungas ta Joden ki Samaritanen.

Anna-tani-k'ma tyni-æn ta. Ina ka makka Samarien, Tou-mimia-en-hou ka Jode-kow ma-ma ki mang, ki pa-yt-au-mau-kow, ka ynna-koh ka makka Sa-maria? Dou äoussi ki saou-saäl-en ki poungas ta Joden ki Samaritanen.
S.TRANS: Soo seyde dan de Samaritaensche brouwe tot hem Noe begeert ghy die een Jode zijt ban my drincken die ick een Samaritaensche brouwe ben: Want de Joden en houden geen gemeynschap met de Samaritanen.
Then saith the woman of Samaria unto him, How is it that thou, being a Jew, askest drink of me, which am a woman of Samaria? for the Jews have no dealings with the Samaritans.
撒馬利亞的婦人對他說：「你既是猶太人，怎麼向我一個撒馬利亞婦人要水喝呢？」原來猶太人和撒馬利亞人沒有來往。

S.FORM: Nda ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Jesus k'ma tyni-æn, Heirou k'a-lang-en-hou lava ta na. pæp-'æ ki Alid, ti-mang-appa ta teni, ka masa sousou ymhou-an, Pa-yht-ou-koh ynna kow t'ou-mimia tyni-æn, ka pi-'æl-ato ymhou-an ki raloum ka mæuægh.

Nda ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Jesus k'ma tyni-æn, Heirou k'a-lang-en-hou lava ta na. pæp-'æ ki Alid, ti-mang-appa ta teni, ka masa sousou ymhou-an, Pa-yht-ou-koh ynna kow t'ou-mimia tyni-æn, ka pi-'æl-ato ymhou-an ki raloum ka mæuægh.
S.TRANS: Jesus antwoorde ende seyde tot haer Indien ghy de gabe Godts kendet ende wie hy is die tot u seght Geeft my te drincken soo soud ghy ban hem hebben begeert ende hy soude u lebende water gegeben hebben.
Jesus answered and said unto her, If thou knewest the gift of God, and who it is that saith to thee, Give me to drink; thou wouldest have asked of him, and he would have given thee living water.
耶穌回答說：「你若知道上帝的恩賜，和對你說『給我水喝』的是誰，你必早求他，他也必早給了你活水。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ina tyni-æn, Meirang, ä'oussi kow ki atug'ka malæu'u ta daouk nda, makka kounna ymhou-an ta raloum ka mæu'ægh?
Ni-k'ma ta ina tyni-æn, Meirang, ä'oussi kow ki atug'ka malæu'u ta daouk nda, makka kounna ymhou-an ta raloum ka mæu'ægh?
S.TRANS: De brouwe seyde tot hem Neere ghy enhbebt niet om mede te putten ende de put is diep ban maer hebt ghy dan het lebende water :
The woman saith unto him, Sir, thou hast nothing to draw with, and the well is deep: from whence then hast thou that living water?
婦人說：「先生，沒有打水的器具，井又深，你從哪裏得活水呢？

S.FORM: Si-ouro' kow kaua tou kei-rang-en ki na Rama-jan ka ti Jacob, ka na pæp-'ætyn ymiæn-æn tadaouk k'atta? ka ni-yht-ten tyn tou atta, ki alalak tyn, kilaula-oung-appa tyn.
Si-ouro' kow kaua tou kei-rang-en ki na Rama-jan ka ti Jacob, ka na pæp-'ætyn ymiæn-æn tadaouk k'atta? ka ni-yht-ten tyn tou atta, ki alalak tyn, kilaula-oung-appa tyn.
S.TRANS: Zijt ghy meerder dan onse bader Jacob die ons den put gegeben heest : ende hy selbe heeft daer uyt gedroncken ende sijne kinderen end sijn bee.
Art thou greater than our father Jacob, which gave us the well, and drank thereof himself, and his children, and his cattle?
我們的祖宗雅各將這井留給我們，他自己和兒子並牲畜也都喝這井裏的水，難道你比他還大嗎？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'ï-vli ta ti Jesus k'ma tyni-æn, Ti-mamang ta myt ki raloum ka atta, milala-âl-appa meittou.
Ni-mattæ'ï-vli ta ti Jesus k'ma tyni-æn, Ti-mamang ta myt ki raloum ka atta, milala-âl-appa meittou.
S.TRANS: Jesus antwoorde ende seyde tot haer Een yeder die -ban ban Dit water drinckt sal wederom borsten.
Jesus answered and said unto her, Whosoever drinketh of this water shall thirst again:
耶穌回答說：「凡喝這水的還要再渴；

S.FORM: Râti-mangta myht-âl-ato ki raloum ka phæ-æn-ei-mau tyni-æn, assi meittou-ah tou yhka-quan myddarynnouh, nda raloum ka phæ-æn-ei-mau tyni-æn, kæuh-tassyk-âl-ato tyni-æn ki raloum ka l'bboar tou kæuag-ar touhan ka myh-kâqua myddaryn-nouh.

Râti-mangta myht-âl-ato ki raloum ka phæ-æn-ei-mau tyni-æn, assi meittou-ah tou yhka-quan myddarynnouh, nda raloum ka phæ-æn-ei-mau tyni-æn, kæuh-tassyk-âl-ato tyni-æn ki raloum ka l'bboar tou kæuag-ar touhan ka myh-kâqua myddaryn-nouh.
S.TRANS: Maer soo wie gedbroncken sal hebben ban Het water Dat ick hem geben sal Die sal in eeuwigheyt niet dorsten maer Het water Dat ick hem sal geben sal in hem worden een sonteyne ban water springende tot Ã­n het eeunwige legen.
But whosoever drinketh of the water that I shall give him shall never thirst; but the water that I shall give him shall be in him a well of water springing up into everlasting life.
人若喝我所賜的水就永遠不渴。我所賜的水要在他裏頭成為泉源，直湧到永生。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma tyni-æn ta ina, Meirang, p'hei-koh ki raloum k'anna, kou assi-ah-koh mi lala meittou, ka assi-mau ou-qua-auh hiä mou-rauraloum.
Ni-k'ma tyni-æn ta ina, Meirang, p'hei-koh ki raloum k'anna, kou assi-ah-koh mi lala meittou, ka assi-mau ou-qua-auh hiä mou-rauraloum.
S.TRANS: De bronwe seyde tot hem Neere geeft my Dat water op dat my niet en dorste ende ick hier niet en [moet] komen omte putten.
The woman saith unto him, Sir, give me this water, that I thirst not, neither come hither to draw.
婦人說：「先生，請把這水賜給我，叫我不渴，也不用來這麼遠打水。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyn i-æn, Ou-qu-au tætææm-au ta tboung oho ka mou-qua hia.
Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyn i-æn, Ou-qu-au tætææm-au ta tboung oho ka mou-qua hia.
S.TRANS: Jesus seyde tat Haer Gaet Henen roept uwen man ende komt Hier.
Jesus saith unto her, Go, call thy husband, and come hither.
耶穌說：「你去叫你丈夫也到這裏來。」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ina ka ni-k'ma, Äoussi-koh ki tboung. Ni-k'matati Jesus tyni-æn, Ma-riang ta fou oho', Äoussi-koh ki tboung.
Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ina ka ni-k'ma, Äoussi-koh ki tboung. Ni-k'matati Jesus tyni-æn, Ma-riang ta fou oho', Äoussi-koh ki tboung.
S.TRANS: De brouwe antwoorde ende seyde Ick en hebbe genen man. Jesus seyde tot haer Ghy hebt wel geseght Ick en hebbe geenen man.
The woman answered and said, I have no husband. Jesus said unto her, Thou hast well said, I have no husband:
婦人說：「我沒有丈夫。」耶穌說：「你說沒有丈夫是不錯的。

S.FORM: Ka ni-akou mea kow ra-rymma ki tboung, ra ka akou-mea kow hnyn assi tboung-oho ka d'lligh, matiktik ta sou-oho k'anna.
Ka ni-akou mea kow ra-rymma ki tboung, ra ka akou-mea kow hnyn assi tboung-oho ka d'lligh, matiktik ta sou-oho k'anna.
S.TRANS: Want ghy hebt bijf mannen gehadt ende Dien ghy nau hebt en is uwe man niet Dat Hebt ghy met waerGendt geseght
For thou hast had five husbands; and he whom thou now hast is not thy husband: in that saidst thou truly.
你已經有五個丈夫，你現在有的並不是你的丈夫。你這話是真的。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ina tyni-æn, Meirang, kmytta-koh ka Tama-Mattæ'i-tan kow.
Ni-k'ma ta ina tyni-æn, Meirang, kmytta-koh ka Tama-Mattæ'i-tan kow.
S.TRANS: De brouwe seyde tot hem Neere Ick sie Dat ghy een Propheet zijt.
The woman saith unto him, Sir, I perceive that thou art a prophet.
婦人說：「先生，我看出你是先知。

S.FORM: Ni-reihp-en tmamud ki na Ramama-jan tou voukkyn k'atta, râ ymoumi ta k'ma, ka tou Jerusalem ta i-tou-qu'-an ki reihp-en tmamud.
Ni-reihp-en tmamud ki na Ramama-jan tou voukkyn k'atta, râ ymoumi ta k'ma, ka tou Jerusalem ta i-tou-qu'-an ki reihp-en tmamud.
S.TRANS: Onse Daders hebben ap desen bergh aengebeden ende ghy-lieden seght Dat te JeruJerusulem De plaetse is daer men moet aenbidden.
Our fathers worshipped in this mountain; and ye say, that in Jerusalem is the place where men ought to worship.
我們的祖宗在這山上禮拜，你們倒說，應當禮拜的地方是在耶路撒冷。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'mata ti Jesus tyni-æn, Ina tna-'msing-â jau-an yrou-a ta kidi ki tæ'læi, ka reihp-ei-moumi tmamud ta Rama assi tou voukkyn k'atta, assi-appa tou Jerusalem.
Ni-k'mata ti Jesus tyni-æn, Ina tna-'msing-â jau-an yrou-a ta kidi ki tæ'læi, ka reihp-ei-moumi tmamud ta Rama assi tou voukkyn k'atta, assi-appa tou Jerusalem.
S.TRANS: Jesus seyde tot haer Drouwe gelooft my dat de aure komt wanneer ghy-lieDen noch op desen bergh noch te Jerusalem den Dader en sult aenbidden.
Jesus saith unto her, Woman, believe me, the hour cometh, when ye shall neither in this mountain, nor yet at Jerusalem, worship the Father.
耶穌說：「婦人，你當信我。時候將到，你們拜父，也不在這山上，也不在耶路撒冷。

S.FORM: Reip-kamou tmamud ta ymoumi ki assi-moumi kavan-an: reip-kame tmamud ta ymi-æn ki kavana-nien: ka makka-qua ki Joden ta kararïang-an.
Reip-kamou tmamud ta ymoumi ki assi-moumi kavan-an: reip-kame tmamud ta ymi-æn ki kavana-nien: ka makka-qua ki Joden ta kararïang-an.
S.TRANS: Ghy-lieden aenbidt dat ghy niet en weet wy aenbidden Dat wy Weten : want De saligheydtis uyt den Joden :
Ye worship ye know not what: we know what we worship: for salvation is of the Jews.
你們所拜的，你們不知道；我們所拜的，我們知道，因為救恩是從猶太人出來的。

S.FORM: Râ, iroua ta [kidi ki] tæ'-lei, ka hnyn anna-un ta anna, ka reihp-ah tmamud ki Rarâm'-an ta Tama-t'amud ka d'llig tou Joep-än tou ka d'llig-an da: Ka k'i'ym-en ki Rama ta k'ma-hyn-na, deip tmamud tyni-æn.

Râ, iroua ta [kidi ki] tæ'lei, ka hnyn anna-un ta anna, ka reihp-ah tmamud ki Rarâm'-an ta Tama-t'amud ka d'llig tou Joep-än tou ka d'llig-an da: Ka k'i'ym-en ki Rama ta k'ma-hynna, deip tmamud tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Maer de ure komt ende is ut Wanneer De wate aenbidders Den Dader aenbidden sulen in Geest ende waerheyt : Want De Dader soeckt ook alsulcke Die hem [alfoo] aenbidden.
But the hour cometh, and now is, when the true worshippers shall worship the Father in spirit and in truth: for the Father seeketh such to worship him.
時候將到，如今就是了，那真正拜父的，要用心靈和誠實拜他，因為父要這樣的人拜他。」

S.FORM: Joep-an ta Alid, na ma-mang ta reip tmamud tyni-æn, deip-ah tmamud ta neni tou Joep-an tou kadilhg an appa.
Joep-an ta Alid, na ma-mang ta reip tmamud tyni-æn, deip-ah tmamud ta neni tou Joep-an tou kadilhg an appa.
S.TRANS: Godt is een Geeft enDe die Hem aenbidden moeten [hem] aenbÃ­dden Ã­n Geest ende waerheyt
God is a Spirit: and they that worship him must worship him in spirit and in truth.
上帝是個靈，所以拜他的必須用心靈和誠實拜他。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ina tyni-æn, Kavanna-en-nau ka irroua ta Messias (ka sioua ti Christus) ka rou irrou-âl-ato ta teni, anna ta ginnau-ah bannavanna ymi-æn-æn.
Ni-k'ma ta ina tyni-æn, Kavanna-en-nau ka irroua ta Messias (ka sioua ti Christus) ka rou irrou-âl-ato ta teni, anna ta ginnau-ah bannavanna ymi-æn-æn.
S.TRANS: De brouwe seyde tot hem Ick weet dat De Messias komt (Die genaemt wort Christus) wanneer die sal gekomen zijn soo sal hy ons alle dingen berkondigen.
The woman saith unto him, I know that Messias cometh, which is called Christ: when he is come, he will tell us all things.
婦人說：「我知道彌賽亞（就是那稱為基督的）要來；他來了，必將一切的事都告訴我們。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, ti jau ta ti atta, ka mâkta væh ym hou-an.
Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, ti jau ta ti atta, ka mâkta væh ym hou-an.
S.TRANS: Jesus seyde tot Haer Ick ben't Die met u spreke.
Jesus saith unto her, I that speak unto thee am he.
耶穌說：「這和你說話的就是他！」

S.FORM: Ka ni-yrroua mei-vavalei ki akou sou ta Pahta tæutæu-en tyn, ka mou-ryng-hgau-'ato ki patætætævæh tyn ki ina; Ra assi ni-k'ma ta ti-mamang, M'ang ta talitali' ohou Mang lava, ta pat-tæ'i-tatavæh oho' tyni-æn.

Ka ni-yrroua mei-vavalei ki akou sou ta Pahta tæutæu-en tyn, ka mou-ryng-hgau-'ato ki patætætævæh tyn ki ina; Ra assi ni-k'ma ta ti-mamang, M'ang ta talitali' ohou Mang lava, ta pat-tæ'i-tatavæh oho' tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Ende daer op quamen sijne Discpule ende berberwonderden haer Dat hy met een brouwe sprack: Nochtans en seyde niemant Wat Draeght ghy ? ofte wat spreeckt ghy met haer.
And upon this came his disciples, and marvelled that he talked with the woman: yet no man said, What seekest thou? or, Why talkest thou with her?
當下門徒回來，就希奇耶穌和一個婦人說話；只是沒有人說：「你是要甚麼？」或說：「你為甚麼和她說話？」

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-atta-ral-len ki Ina ta atugh tyn, ka ni-d'marang meu-'uma mattæi kma-hyn, na ki ta'u,
Anna ta ni-atta-ral-len ki Ina ta atugh tyn, ka ni-d'marang meu-'uma mattæi kma-hyn, na ki ta'u,
S.TRANS: Soo berliet de brouwe Dan haer water-bat ende gingh henen Ã­n de stadt ende seyde tot De lieden
The woman then left her waterpot, and went her way into the city, and saith to the men,
那婦人就留下水罐子，往城裏去，對眾人說：

S.FORM: Nda, ou-qu-a k'ytt-ei ta tæu ka ni-banna-vanna' jau-an ymmid ki na ringei-au: Assi kaua ti Christus ta ti anna ?
Nda, ou-qu-a k'ytt-ei ta tæu ka ni-banna-vanna' jau-an ymmid ki na ringei-au: Assi kaua ti Christus ta ti anna ?
S.TRANS: Konmt siet een mensche Die my geseght heeft alles wat ick gedaen hebbe: Is dese niet de Christus :
Come, see a man, which told me all things that ever I did: is not this the Christ?
「你們來看！有一個人將我素來所行的一切事都給我說出來了，莫非這就是基督嗎？」

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-'tpæpænæh ki ni-pakka-eum 'æn ta neni iroua tyni-æn.
Anna ta ni-'tpæpænæh ki ni-pakka-eum 'æn ta neni iroua tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Sy Dan gingen uyt der stadt ende quamen tot hem.
Then they went out of the city, and came unto him.
眾人就出城，往耶穌那裏去。

S.FORM: Tou ptaki kidi k'anna ni-'nmahi ta Pahtatæutæu-en tyn tyni-æn k'ma, Rabbi, mavok-â.
Tou ptaki kidi k'anna ni-'nmahi ta Pahtatæutæu-en tyn tyni-æn k'ma, Rabbi, mavok-â.
S.TRANS: Ende ondertusschen baden hem De Discipulen seggende Rabbi eet.
In the mean while his disciples prayed him, saying, Master, eat.
這其間，門徒對耶穌說：「拉比，請吃。」

S.FORM: Râ ni-k'ma ta teni neini-æn, Akou kakannin-koh ki kan-nau-mau, k'asi-moumi 'ou-m'han.
Râ ni-k'ma ta teni neini-æn, Akou kakannin-koh ki kan-nau-mau, k'asi-moumi 'ou-m'han.
S.TRANS: Maer hy seyde tot haer Ick hebbe een spijse om te eten Die ghy niet en weet.
But he said unto them, I have meat to eat that ye know not of.
耶穌說：「我有食物吃，是你們不知道的。」

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-mattæ'i-nau-nado mattæ'i-tavæh ki sou ta Pæhtatæutæu-æn, Ni-mad kaua ta ti-maman' ki k'an-n-auh tyn ?
Anna ta ni-mattæ'i-nau-nado mattæ'i-tavæh ki sou ta Pæhtatæutæu-æn, Ni-mad kaua ta ti-maman' ki k'an-n-auh tyn ?
S.TRANS: Soo sepden Dan De Dicipulen tegen malkanderen heeft hem yemant te eten gebsacht.
Therefore said the disciples one to another, Hath any man brought him ought to eat?
門徒就彼此對問說：「莫非有人拿甚麼給他吃嗎？」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, K'a kan-au-mau ta anna ka pam't-au-mau ta kamoei-in ki ni-madingi jau-an, ka pei-mouhga-au-mau ta ring-ei tyn.
Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, K'a kan-au-mau ta anna ka pam't-au-mau ta kamoei-in ki ni-madingi jau-an, ka pei-mouhga-au-mau ta ring-ei tyn.
S.TRANS: Jefus seyde tot haer Mijn sijse is dat ick Doe Den wille des genen Die my giesonden heeft ende sijn werck bolbrenge.
Jesus saith unto them, My meat is to do the will of him that sent me, and to finish his work.
耶穌說：「我的食物就是遵行差我來者的旨意，做成他的工。

S.FORM: Assi-kamou kaua mattæ'i-kma-hynna ki fou, Pahpat appa tavoural, anna ta irouâ ta'ajam-mæn? Kmyttâ-ato, pasousou-koun-nau-kamou-ra, pa-pa-sa'u-vavaua ki matta-oumi mararau ki dapoudap: ka mapoulé-ato tou 'ajam-eih hnyn.

Assi-kamou kaua mattæ'i-kma-hynna ki fou, Pahpat appa tavoural, anna ta irouâ ta'ajam-mæn? Kmyttâ-ato, pasousou-koun-nau-kamou-ra, pa-pa-sa'u-vavaua ki matta-oumi mararau ki dapoudap: ka mapoulé-ato tou 'ajam-eih hnyn.
S.TRANS: Seght ghy-lieden niet het zijn noch bier maenden ende [ Dan] komt Den ooghst: Siet Siet ick segge u heft uwe oogen op ende aenschouwt De landen : want sy zijn aldreede wit om te ooghsren
Say not ye, There are yet four months, and then cometh harvest? behold, I say unto you, Lift up your eyes, and look on the fields; for they are white already to harvest.
你們豈不說『到收割的時候還有四個月』嗎？我告訴你們，舉目向田觀看，莊稼已經熟了，可以收割了。

S.FORM: Kati-mangta maajam ma-ra ki than ki ouvavarg-han ka uld-den tyn ki voua tou kæuag-han ka myhkaqua myddaryn-nouh, alei ka ma-saal-lah marai ta dmierri ki maajam.
Kati-mangta maajam mara ki than ki ouvavarg-han ka uld-den tyn ki voua tou kæuag-han ka myhkaqua myddaryn-nouh, alei ka ma-saal-lah marai ta dmierri ki maajam.
S.TRANS: Ende Die maeyt ontsanght loon ende bergadert brucht ten eeuwigen leben om Dat hem te samen berblijde beyde Die zaeyt enDe Die matyt.
And he that reapeth receiveth wages, and gathereth fruit unto life eternal: that both he that soweth and he that reapeth may rejoice together.
收割的人得工價，積蓄五穀到永生，叫撒種的和收割的一同快樂。

S.FORM: Ka dilligh tou atta ma-tiktik ta sou kanna, Pani ta dmierri, pani appata naajam.
Ka dilligh tou atta ma-tiktik ta sou kanna, Pani ta dmierri, pani appata naajam.
S.TRANS: Want hier in is Die syreucke waerachtigh Een ander is het die zaeht ende een ander Die maeyt.
And herein is that saying true, One soweth, and another reapeth.
俗語說：『那人撒種，這人收割』，這話可見是真的。

S.FORM: Ni-padingi-en-au-kamou paajam ki assi-moumi ni-ou-m'-an mapoungas: ra pani ta ni [ mouma ] mapoungas, ka ni-sahka qua-noumi ki ni-ou-ma'an nein mapoungas.
Ni-padingi-en-au-kamou paajam ki assi-moumi ni-ou-m'-an mapoungas: ra pani ta ni [ mouma ] mapoungas, ka ni-sahka qua-noumi ki ni-ou-ma'an nein mapoungas.
S.TRANS: Ick hebbe u uyt gesonden om te maeyen Het ghene ghy niet bearbeyt en hebt : andere hebbenâ€™t bearbeyt en De ghy zijt tot Haren arbendt ingegaen.
I sent you to reap that whereon ye bestowed no labour: other men laboured, and ye are entered into their labours.
我差你們去收你們所沒有勞苦的；別人勞苦，你們享受他們所勞苦的。」

S.FORM: Kamabatoung ki Samaritanen ka makka æuma k'anna ta ni-tna-msing tyni-æn alei ki ina ka gmail, ni-bana-vana tenijau-an ymmud ki na ringei-au.
Kamabatoung ki Samaritanen ka makka æuma k'anna ta ni-tna-msing tyni-æn alei ki ina ka gmail, ni-bana-vana tenijau-an ymmud ki na ringei-au.
S.TRANS: Ende bele Der Samaritanen uyt Die stadt geloofden in hem om Het woort Der brouwe die ghetuyghde Hy heeft mn gheseght alles wat ick gedaen hebbe.
And many of the Samaritans of that city believed on him for the saying of the woman, which testified, He told me all that ever I did.
那城裏有好些撒馬利亞人信了耶穌，因為那婦人作見證說：「他將我素來所行的一切事都給我說出來了。」

S.FORM: Irou ka irou-âto tyni-æn ta Samaritanen, ni-tmoumimia tyni-æn ki pæ-iliili-eih tyn neini-æn: ka ni-mæili hynna makka rouha ki wæi
Irou ka irou-âto tyni-æn ta Samaritanen, ni-tmoumimia tyni-æn ki pæ-iliili-eih tyn neini-æn: ka ni-mæili hynna makka rouha ki wæi
S.TRANS: Als Dan De Samaritanen tot hem gekomen waren baden sy hem dat hy by Haer blebe : ende hy bleef by haer aldaer twee Dagen.
So when the Samaritans were come unto him, they besought him that he would tarry with them: and he abode there two days.
於是撒馬利亞人來見耶穌，求他在他們那裏住下，他便在那裏住了兩天。

S.FORM: Ka siouro mabatoung ta ni-tnamsing alei ki sou tyn.
Ka siouro mabatoung ta ni-tnamsing alei ki sou tyn.
S.TRANS: Ende daer geloofdender beel meer om sijns woorts wille.
And many more believed because of his own word;
因耶穌的話，信的人就更多了，

S.FORM: Ka ni k'ma ki ina, Assi-kame tna-msing hnyn alei ki na sou-oho, ra ni-ni-tna-mado-ni-an millingigh, ka kavanani-an ka missing ti atta ta ti Christus, ka Tama-Pa kariàng ki ymmud ki næi.
Ka ni k'ma ki ina, Assi-kame tna-msing hnyn alei ki na sou-oho, ra ni-ni-tna-mado-ni-an millingigh, ka kavanani-an ka missing ti atta ta ti Christus, ka Tama-Pa kariàng ki ymmud ki næi.
S.TRANS: EnEnde seyden tot De brouwe Wy en geloben niet Meer om uwes seggens wille want wy selbe hebben [hem] gehoort ende weten dat dese waerlick is De Christus De Salighmaker der werelt.
And said unto the woman, Now we believe, not because of thy saying: for we have heard him ourselves, and know that this is indeed the Christ, the Saviour of the world.
便對婦人說：「現在我們信，不是因為你的話，是我們親自聽見了，知道這真是救世主。」

S.FORM: Ka sì æugh ki rouha ki wæ'i, ni-d'marang hynna, ka ni-sah-ka-qua mou-qua tou Galilea.
Ka sì æugh ki rouha ki wæ'i, ni-d'marang hynna, ka ni-sah-ka-qua mou-qua tou Galilea.
S.TRANS: Ende na de twee dagen gingh hy ban Daer ende gingh henen na Galileen
Now after two days he departed thence, and went into Galilee.
過了那兩天，耶穌離了那地方，往加利利去。

S.FORM: Ka ni-mæddo gmail ti Jesus ka äoussi ki louloug-an ta Ta-ma Mattæ'i tou pourough ti A-ma tyn.
Ka ni-mæddo gmail ti Jesus ka äoussi ki louloug-an ta Tama Mattæ'i tou pourough ti A-ma tyn.
S.TRANS: Want Jesus heeft selbe getuyght Dat een Pro-= pheet In sijn engen baderlant geen eere en heeft.
For Jesus himself testified, that a prophet hath no honour in his own country.
因為耶穌自己作過見證說：「先知在本地是沒有人尊敬的。」

S.FORM: Irou ka mou-qua ta teni tou Galilæa ni-pa-hyh tatalagh tyni-æn ta ta'u ka makka Galilea, dou ni-kytt'an nein ta mamang ka na ringei tyn tou Jerusalem tou wæi ki ou-vavatoug-han: kani-lum-mad-appa ta neni tou ou-vava-toug-han.

Irou ka mou-qua ta teni tou Galilæa ni-pa-hyh tatalagh tyni-æn ta ta'u ka makka Galilea, dou ni-kytt'an nein ta mamang ka na ringei tyn tou Jerusalem tou wæi ki ou-vavatoug-han: kani-lum-mad-appa ta neni tou ou-vava-toug-han.
S.TRANS: Als hy dan in Galileen quam ontsingen hem de Galileers ghesien hebbende alle De digen die hy te Jerusulen op Het Feeft ghedaen hadde : want oock sy waren tot Het feeft gegaen.
Then when he was come into Galilee, the Galilaeans received him, having seen all the things that he did at Jerusalem at the feast: for they also went unto the feast.
到了加利利，加利利人既然看見他在耶路撒冷過節所行的一切事，就接待他，因為他們也是上去過節。

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-salikogh ta ti Jesus mou-qua tou Kana tou Ga-lilæa, ka ni-pa-ha hala-un tyn ta raloum ki hala ki karæumættæh tou hynna. Ka akoumea hynna ta saat ka talalam ki Meisasou ka siba vau, ka pæi-a-lalam-men ki alak tyn ka pæræh tou Kapernaum.

Anna ta ni-salikogh ta ti Jesus mou-qua tou Kana tou Galilæa, ka ni-pa-ha hala-un tyn ta raloum ki hala ki karæumættæh tou hynna. Ka akoumea hynna ta saat ka talalam ki Meisasou ka siba vau, ka pæi-a-lalam-men ki alak tyn ka pæræh tou Kapernaum.
S.TRANS: Soo quam dan Jesus wederom te Tana tn Gaz lileen Daer hy het water wijn gemaeckt hadde. Ende daer was een seker kominckliick [hoveling] wiens sone krank waste Tapernaum.
So Jesus came again into Cana of Galilee, where he made the water wine. And there was a certain nobleman, whose son was sick at Capernaum.
耶穌又到了加利利的迦拿，就是他從前變水為酒的地方。有一個大臣，他的兒子在迦百農患病。

S.FORM: Teni rou ni-milligh ka lummad-den ti Jesus makka Judea mou-qua tou Galilæa ni-mou-qua tyni-æn ka ni-tmoumi-mi-en tyn tyni-æn kou'ou-rapag-auh tyn padaryk kægh ta alak tyn ka pæræh: ka myhte æuh mihgynna-ua ta teni.

Teni rou ni-milligh ka lummad-den ti Jesus makka Judea mou-qua tou Galilæa ni-mou-qua tyni-æn ka ni-tmoumi-mi-en tyn tyni-æn kou'ou-rapag-auh tyn padaryk kægh ta alak tyn ka pæræh: ka myhte æuh mihgynna-ua ta teni.
S.TRANS: Dese gehoort hebbedde Dat Jesus uyt Judea int Galileen quam gingh tot hem ende badt hem Dat hy afquame ende sijnen sone gesondt maeckmaeckte : want hy lagh op sijn sterben.
When he heard that Jesus was come out of Judaea into Galilee, he went unto him, and besought him that he would come down, and heal his son: for he was at the point of death.
他聽見耶穌從猶太到了加利利，就來見他，求他下去醫治他的兒子，因為他兒子快要死了。

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus ty-ni-æn, Heirou assi-moumi k'yt-t'an ta pou-kidi-en ki 'ou-rynh-gau-en appa ka ringei, assi-kamou tna-msing-ah.
Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus ty-ni-æn, Heirou assi-moumi k'yt-t'an ta pou-kidi-en ki 'ou-rynh-gau-en appa ka ringei, assi-kamou tna-msing-ah.
S.TRANS: Jesus dan fseydt tot hem ; â€™t En zy Dat ghy-lieden tekenen ende wonderen siet soo en sult ghy nÃ­et ghelooben.
Then said Jesus unto him, Except ye see signs and wonders, ye will not believe.
耶穌就對他說：「若不看見神蹟奇事，你們總是不信。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma tyni-æn ta talalam ki Mei-sasou ka si-bavau, Mei-rang mou-rapag-â tou ouro ka assi-appa mapatei ta alak-au.
Ni-k'ma tyni-æn ta talalam ki Mei-sasou ka si-bavau, Mei-rang mou-rapag-â tou ouro ka assi-appa mapatei ta alak-au.
S.TRANS: De Tonincklicke [hovelinck] seyde tot hem Neere komt: af eer mijn kint sterst
The nobleman saith unto him, Sir, come down ere my child die.
那大臣說：「先生，求你趁着我的孩子還沒有死就下去。」

S.FORM: O Nik'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn,'Ou-qua, mæuag ta alak oho. Ka ni-tha-msing ta ta'u ki sou, ka pa-sousou-en ti Jesus tyni-æn; ka ni-'ou-qua tyn.
O Nik'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn,'Ou-qua, mæuag ta alak oho. Ka ni-tha-msing ta ta'u ki sou, ka pa-sousou-en ti Jesus tyni-æn; ka ni-'ou-qua tyn.
S.TRANS: Ny quam dan in een stadt ban Samarien ghenaemt Sichar na hy het stuck landts â€™t welck Jacob sijnen sone Joseph gaf.
Jesus saith unto him, Go thy way; thy son liveth. And the man believed the word that Jesus had spoken unto him, and he went his way.
耶穌對他說：「回去吧，你的兒子活了！」那人信耶穌所說的話就回去了。

S.FORM: Irouka 'ou-rapag-han tyn ni-dmoum ma-doumma tyni-æn ta koungsia tyn, hmagnau k'ma, Mæuagta alak oho.
Irouka 'ou-rapag-han tyn ni-dmoum ma-doumma tyni-æn ta koungsia tyn, hmagnau k'ma, Mæuagta alak oho.
S.TRANS: Ende als hy nu afginck quamen hem sijne Dienstknechten te ghemoete ende boodtschapten seggende uw' kindt leeft.
And as he was now going down, his servants met him, and told him, saying, Thy son liveth.
正下去的時候，他的僕人迎見他，說他的兒子活了。

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-tmaligh neini-æn ki kidi ki tælei ki ni-tmyll-an ki maläam tyn: ka ni-k'ma ta neini tyni-æn, Y'ha tou ka pa-pyttou ki tælei ni-'ous-san ki ǣyn-gyt tyni-æn.
Anna ta ni-tmaligh neini-æn ki kidi ki tælei ki ni-tmyll-an ki maläam tyn: ka ni-k'ma ta neini tyni-æn, Y'ha tou ka pa-pyttou ki tælei ni-'ous-san ki ǣyn-gyt tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Soo braegde hy Dan ban haer de uure in welcke het beter met hem geworden was: ende zeyden tot hem Gisteren te zeben uuren berliet hem De koortse.
Then enquired he of them the hour when he began to amend. And they said unto him, Yesterday at the seventh hour the fever left him.
他就問甚麼時候見好的。他們說：「昨日未時熱就退了。」

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-k'alang-en ki Rama ka d'lligh ki tælei k'anna ki ni-pasousou-en ti Jesus tyni-æn, Mæuag ta alak-oho: Ka ni-tna-msing ta teni tna-mado tna-tmouk appa ki tallagh tyn.
Anna ta ni-k'alang-en ki Rama ka d'lligh ki tælei k'anna ki ni-pasousou-en ti Jesus tyni-æn, Mæuag ta alak-oho: Ka ni-tna-msing ta teni tna-mado tna-tmouk appa ki tallagh tyn.
S.TRANS: De Dader bekende Dan Dat Het op De zelbe uure [was] in De welke Jesus tot hem geseght hadde Dw' Zone leeft : Ende hy gheloofde zelbe ende zijn heheet Huyb
So the father knew that it was at the same hour, in the which Jesus said unto him, Thy son liveth: and himself believed, and his whole house.
他便知道這正是耶穌對他說「你兒子活了」的時候；他自己和全家就都信了。

S.FORM: Ka rarouha ki na pou-ka-kidi katta ni-he-lan ti Jesus pamut, dou lummad-ato makka Judea mou-qua tou Galilæa.
Ka rarouha ki na pou-ka-kidi katta ni-he-lan ti Jesus pamut, dou lummad-ato makka Judea mou-qua tou Galilæa.
S.TRANS: Dit tweede teken heeft Jesus. Jesus wederom gedaen Als hy uyt Judea in Galileen gekomen was
This is again the second miracle that Jesus did, when he was come out of Judaea into Galilee.
這是耶穌在加利利行的第二件神蹟，是他從猶太回去以後行的。
